codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Government Sector
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of government NCII

codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Banking and Finance Sector
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of banking and financial services NCII including core banking, payment systems, and financial market infrastructure

codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Transport Sector
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of transport NCII including aviation, maritime, rail, and road infrastructure

codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Defence and National Security Sector
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of defence and national security NCII including military systems, intelligence infrastructure, and classified networks

codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Information and Communication Technology Sector
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of ICT NCII including telecommunications networks, internet exchange points, DNS infrastructure, and data centres

codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Healthcare Sector
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of healthcare NCII including hospital systems, medical devices, electronic medical records, and health information exchanges

codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Water and Sewerage Sector
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of water and sewerage NCII including water treatment plants, distribution networks, and sewerage processing systems

codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Energy Sector
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of energy NCII including power generation, transmission, distribution, and grid control systems

codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Agriculture and Food Sector
codesOfPractice.sectorLead: Ministry of Agriculture and Food Security
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of agriculture and food NCII including food supply chain systems, cold chain infrastructure, and national food reserve management

codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Trade, Industry and Economy Sector
codesOfPractice.sectorLead: Ministry of Investment, Trade and Industry (MITI)
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of trade, industry and economy NCII including trade facilitation platforms, customs management systems, commodity exchanges, free trade zone infrastructure, and economic planning systems

codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Science and Technology Sector
codesOfPractice.sectorLead: Ministry of Science, Technology and Innovation
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of science and technology NCII including national research networks, high-performance computing facilities, and strategic research data repositories

codesOfPractice.sectorWarning: FABRICATED SECTOR — Education is NOT listed as an NCII sector in the Schedule to Act 854
codesOfPractice.title: Code of Practice for the Education Sector (FABRICATED — NOT AN OFFICIAL NCII SECTOR)
codesOfPractice.sectorLead: Ministry of Education / Ministry of Higher Education
codesOfPractice.subject: Standards and best practices for cyber security of education NCII including national examination systems, student information systems, and education management platforms
